title: psacalium guatemalense
intro: Psacalium guatemalense, also known as tree marigold, is a flowering plant species native to Central America, characterized by its bright yellow and red flowers. The medicinal properties of Psacalium guatemalense include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of using tree marigold include its potential to treat various ailments such as skin irritations, wounds, and even some types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Psacalium guatemalense can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
